name: scholarium-teacher-report
description: Prepare bounded teacher reports without raw private transcripts.

interface.shortDescription: Prepare bounded teacher reports without raw private transcripts.
interface.longDescription: Prepare bounded teacher reports without raw private transcripts. Stateless by design: durable graph and memory operations go through the central Scholarium gateway.
interface.defaultPrompt: Prepare one teacher report separating observation, inference and human decision.
